name: Autoflow
description: Draws flow arrows between frames as you select them.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: appears to operate on the current file selection only. No external communication observed in an initial pass.
review_summary: Placeholder review. Initial inspection suggests the plugin manipulates the local document only. Network behavior has not been formally verified.
limitations: Network traffic not inspected; Source code not available for audit
mitigation: Use on non-confidential files until network behavior is verified.

name: Content Reel
description: Fills designs with text strings, avatars and icons pulled from a shared content library.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: content is fetched from a remote Microsoft service, and a Microsoft account is used for publishing shared palettes. The exact data sent alongside requests is not verified.
data_accessed: Selected layers; Text content of filled layers
review_summary: Placeholder review. The plugin communicates with Microsoft-hosted services to fetch content. What metadata accompanies those requests is unknown pending traffic inspection.
tests_performed: Documentation review; Privacy policy read; Basic manual usage
limitations: Traffic inspection not yet performed; Retention policy for published palettes unknown
mitigation: Avoid filling layers with confidential text while behavior is unverified.

name: Unsplash
description: Inserts free high-resolution photos from Unsplash directly into designs.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: image search queries are necessarily sent to the Unsplash API. No document content beyond the search terms appears to leave the file.
analytics: Unsplash internal analytics (inferred from privacy policy)
review_summary: Placeholder review. Search terms are transmitted to Unsplash to return results — treat search queries as public. No indication that document contents are read beyond inserting images.
tests_performed: Privacy policy read; Documentation review; Basic manual usage
limitations: Traffic inspection not yet performed; Query logging practices inferred from policy rather than observed
mitigation: Do not type confidential project names into the search field.

name: Blush
description: Customizable illustration collections by artists, inserted straight into your file.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: illustrations are fetched from Blush servers. An optional account unlocks premium collections; what usage data is tied to it is unknown.
review_summary: Placeholder review. Asset delivery requires network calls to Blush infrastructure. Account-linked usage tracking is unverified.
tests_performed: Privacy policy read; Basic manual usage
limitations: Traffic inspection not yet performed; Premium account flows not tested

name: Pitchdeck
description: Turns Figma frames into animated presentations exportable to PowerPoint, Keynote and Google Slides.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: exporting requires frame contents to be processed, and the vendor states exports are encrypted and processed transiently. Independent verification has not been performed.
permissions: Current page read; Network access; Export access
data_accessed: Frame contents of exported slides; Text and images in exported frames
review_summary: Placeholder review. Slide contents leave the local file during export by design. Vendor documentation describes client-side encryption; this has not been independently verified.
limitations: Encryption claims not independently verified; No traffic inspection performed
mitigation: Export only slides that are safe to transmit until claims are verified.

name: Framer Motion
description: Open-source animation library for React, used across Framer projects and the wider web.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: a client-side library whose source is public. The library itself performs no network calls; anything it animates stays in your app.
permissions: None (library; runs inside your own app)
review_summary: Placeholder review. As an open-source npm dependency, the code is publicly auditable and no data collection is present in the library itself. Standard supply-chain caution for npm packages still applies.
tests_performed: Source code review (spot check); Repository inspection
limitations: Full source audit not performed; Transitive dependencies not audited
mitigation: Pin versions and review updates as with any npm dependency.

name: LottieFiles
description: Browse, test and insert Lottie animations; sync assets with your LottieFiles workspace.
risk_reason: Placeholder assessment: the plugin authenticates against a LottieFiles account and syncs assets with LottieFiles cloud storage. Workspace sync means selected assets leave the local file.
data_accessed: Inserted animations; Assets uploaded to workspace
review_summary: Placeholder review. Cloud sync is a core feature, so uploaded assets are stored on LottieFiles infrastructure under their retention policies. Telemetry scope is unknown.
tests_performed: Privacy policy read; Documentation review; Basic manual usage
limitations: Traffic inspection not yet performed; Retention and deletion behavior not tested
mitigation: Only sync assets you are comfortable storing with a third party.
